'''Shar Shar''' was the [[Regent/Legends|Regent]] [[G'Mai Duris]]' assistant at the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. During a private meeting around [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Shar and Duris were visited by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Doolb Snoil]].
